audit_items.proof_trace: AcquireRandomInfoThreadSet() can return NULL on memory allocation failure, but random_info[0] is dereferenced at line 326 without NULL check. Memory allocation can fail under low-memory conditions leading to segmentation fault.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker triggers memory exhaustion during image processing, causing AcquireRandomInfoThreadSet() to return NULL and crashing the application when random_info[0] is accessed.
